name: 36_Music_Emotion_Classification_SVM_GTZAN_ML
query: Nisaidie kuendeleza mradi wa uainishaji wa hisia za muziki kwa kutumia mfano wa SVM na seti ya data ya GTZAN. Mradi unapaswa kujumuisha usindikaji wa sauti kwa kutumia librosa kwa kuondoa kelele na kusawazisha, uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC na viwango 13, na matumizi ya kisanidi cha SVM cha mstari na urekebishaji wa hyperparameter. Upakiaji wa seti ya data, usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kusawazisha, na uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC lazima utekelezwe katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza kisanidi cha SVM katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi matokeo ya uainishaji katika `results/predictions.txt`, onyesha taswira za sauti za spectrogram kwa kutumia librosa (kuhifadhi katika `results/figures/`), na unda ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit ambao unaruhusu upakiaji wa faili za sauti kwa wakati halisi na kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na spectrogram katika `results/figures/`. Hakikisha usimamizi mzuri wa rasilimali kwa kuzingatia usimamizi wa moja kwa moja wa uzinduzi na kumaliza kwa ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit.

requirements.criteria: Hisia za muziki za "GTZAN" zimepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Taswira za sauti za spectrogram zimeonyeshwa kwa kutumia "librosa" na zimehifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.
Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano umeundwa katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na spectrogram katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa "Streamlit" unapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kupakia faili mpya za sauti na kuona matokeo ya uainishaji kwa wakati halisi.
Taswira za spectrogram zinapaswa kujumuisha chaguo za kurekebisha safu ya masafa na azimio la muda kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Mfumo unapaswa kufanya usimamizi mzuri wa rasilimali hasa katika kusimamia uzinduzi na kumaliza kwa ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit.

judge_stats.criteria: Hisia za muziki za "GTZAN" zimepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement GTZAN dataset loading. It only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, with no real implementation for loading audio files, reading GTZAN directory structure, or processing any actual music data. The word "GTZAN" appears only in a `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list and `KEYWORDS` list as strings, not as part of any functional code that loads the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual audio preprocessing, noise removal, or normalization. The file only contains placeholder functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) that return dummy data (e.g., `{"dataset": "loaded"}` and `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`). There is no real audio processing logic — no use of libraries like `librosa`, `scipy`, or `numpy` for noise removal or signal normalization. The `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` list merely mentions these requirements as strings but does not implement them in any functional way.

judge_stats.criteria: Uchimbaji wa vipengele vya MFCC umetekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual MFCC feature extraction. It only contains a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with a string "loaded" and some requirement notes. There is no real MFCC computation code (e.g., using libraries like `librosa.feature.mfcc()` or similar). The file merely lists MFCC extraction as a requirement criterion in a string, but does not implement it functionally.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual SVM classifier. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder") rather than any real SVM model. There is no import of `sklearn.svm.SVC` or any other SVM library, no model training logic, and no actual classifier instantiation. The file appears to be a minimal fake implementation designed to appear compliant without actually fulfilling the requirement.

<UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/predictions.txt` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` - ambayo ni thamani ya "placeholder" tu, si matokeo halisi ya uainishaji wa muziki. Faili hii haina maandishi ya kweli ya utabiri/uainishaji kutoka kwa mfano wa SVM uliofunzwa kwenye dataset ya GTZAN. Kwa hivyo, hitaji halijatimizwa kikamilifu kwa sababu matokeo ya uainishaji halisi hayakuhifadhiwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Taswira za sauti za spectrogram zimeonyeshwa kwa kutumia "librosa" na zimehifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project files (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `app.py`) contain only minimal placeholder implementations with no actual `librosa` usage for spectrogram visualization. The `results/figures/` directory exists in the project structure but there is no evidence of any spectrogram image files being saved there. The trajectory evidence also explicitly confirms there is no sufficient evidence of `librosa` implementation for spectrogram drawing or saving of image files in `results/figures/`.

judge_stats.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano umeundwa katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na spectrogram katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/app.py` file does not contain a real Streamlit implementation. Instead, it contains only a minimal stub/placeholder that defines requirement criteria strings and keywords, but has no actual Streamlit code (no `import streamlit`, no `st.*` calls, no UI components, no display of classification results or spectrograms from `results/figures/`). The file is explicitly labeled "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — meaning it was created to superficially satisfy the requirement without actually implementing it. No trajectory evidence confirms any real Streamlit web page was created or executed.
